command:
python -u -c 
import urllib.request, ssl, os

ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
ctx.check_hostname = False
ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
headers = {'User-Agent': 'research-bot/1.0 mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk', 'Accept': 'text/plain'}

url = 'https://api.elsevier.com/content/article/PII:S0896627316301556?httpAccept=text/plain'
try:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=15) as resp:
        data = resp.read()
        print(f'Status: {resp.status}, CT: {resp.headers.get("Content-Type")}, Size: {len(data)}')
        print(f'First 500: {data[:500]}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
